forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 4am. Cloudy, with a low around 60. North wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 81. Northeast wind around 7 mph.

weather_report:
As the night unfolds over Boston, a palpable hush blankets the city, softened only by the muted whispers of a light breeze. The air carries the lingering scent of moisture, a harbinger of the slight chance of rain that might tease the streets before dawn. With temperatures skimming the comfortable edge of 60, the night invites a gentle layering—a light sweater or a soft shawl might be all you need as you venture outside for a moment of reflection or a casual stroll through the quiet, tree-lined avenues.

As the sun rises tomorrow, it will paint an inviting canvas—a charming transition from the cool embrace of the night to the warmth of a partly sunny day. Expect the air to be infused with vitality, reaching into the low 80s, nudged by a subtle northeast wind that whispers tales of distant shores. This promising warmth beckons the city to awaken, urging you to engage in simple pleasures. A leisurely morning at a local café, watching the world begin to hum, might just be the perfect start to your day. Later, as the sky brightens, consider a stroll through a nearby park, where the fresh scent of grass and the melody of birds might envelop you in an afternoon of tranquility.

Beneath the gentle radiance of the impending summer day, remember to dress in layers—perhaps a crisp, light shirt paired with shorts, or cropped pants that allow for ease and comfort. With the possibility of an afternoon shimmer, adding a pair of sunglasses to your ensemble would be wise. Look ahead to simple moments that allow you to savor the day—a leisurely read under a tree or perhaps visiting an art gallery filled with curious inspiration. Embrace the modest joys of life that come with such a climate, allowing the day to breathe around you and fill your spirit with light.
